title: Project Telos Sixteenth-Wave Cyclic Summation-By-Parts Replay Claims

claims.text: The sixteenth-wave package adds a bounded Lean cyclic summation-by-parts replay rung while keeping smooth periodic integration by parts NOT_REPLAYED and the parent Millennium problem UNVERIFIABLE.
claims.falsification: The package is missing, lacks the cyclic summation-by-parts replay artifact, or claims the smooth PDE theorem or Navier-Stokes parent problem is proved.

claims.text: The sixteenth-wave theorem is stored in a separate Lean file and preserves the fourteenth-wave and fifteenth-wave source hashes.
claims.falsification: The sixteenth theorem mutates either prior Lean source file, or the recorded prior source hashes no longer match.

claims.text: CyclicSummationByPartsPreflight.lean compiles with Lean exit code 0 and replays lastPair, gradientOpen, divergenceInterior, cyclicGradientSum, cyclicDivergenceSum, open_summation_by_parts, and cyclic_summation_by_parts_cancels.
claims.falsification: The Lean file is missing, the replay receipt is missing, the command does not exit 0, or the package claims the discrete theorem proves the smooth PDE theorem.

claims.text: The sixteenth-wave source refresh retains 13 arXiv metadata rows, 13 unique IDs, verifies both Gather stores as MATCH, and demotes the rows to SOURCE_LEAD_ONLY.
claims.falsification: The source demotion gate is missing, counts differ, store verification does not match, or metadata is promoted as paper truth.

claims.text: The website copy and official-copy scaffold distinguish CYCLIC_SUMMATION_BY_PARTS_MATCH from NOT_REPLAYED smooth theorem claims.
claims.falsification: Any updated publication surface collapses the finite paired-stencil replay into a smooth periodic integration-by-parts proof or omits the NOT_REPLAYED boundary.

claims.text: The sixteenth-wave content queue includes explicit do-not-post boundaries for Navier-Stokes, smooth periodic integration by parts, source truth, exhaustive coverage, native BuildLang relation receipts, and accepted-publication claims.
claims.falsification: The content queue is missing or omits those boundaries.
